app.name: Goldfish
app.tagline: Memory like a goldfish — so you don't have to.

onboarding.title: Create your vault
onboarding.subtitle: Choose a master password. It encrypts everything and is never stored — if you forget it, your data cannot be recovered.
onboarding.too_weak: Choose a stronger master password — mix length, words, and symbols.
onboarding.warning: There is no password reset. Write your master password down and keep it somewhere safe.

unlock.title: Unlock Goldfish
unlock.subtitle: Enter your master password to open the vault.

vault.empty_hint: Add your first login with the Add button.

entry.title: Title
entry.breach_pwned: Found in {{count}} known breaches — change it
entry.expiry_warning: This password is {{days}} days old — consider changing it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autolock_help: Lock the vault after this many minutes of inactivity. Set 0 to disable.
settings.lock_on_blur: Lock when the window loses focus
settings.password_expiry: Remind to change passwords older than
settings.password_expiry_help: Flags entries whose password hasn't changed in this many days. Set 0 to disable (modern guidance discourages forced rotation).
settings.biometric_locked_hint: Unlock the vault first to enable biometric unlock.
settings.biometric_unavailable_hint: Biometric unlock isn't available. Set up Windows Hello (PIN/fingerprint/face) or macOS Touch ID in your system settings, then reopen this window. See the log window for details.
settings.import_help: Import logins from another password manager's export file.

backup.title: Encrypted backup
backup.help: Save your whole vault to a password-protected .goldfish file you can store safely or restore on another device. The backup password is independent of your master password.
backup.too_weak: Choose a stronger backup password — a backup is a full, portable copy of your vault.

health.title: Vault health
health.all_good: No issues found — your vault looks healthy.
health.stale: Not changed in over a year
health.breach_scanning: Checking passwords against Have I Been Pwned…
health.breach_clean: No passwords found in known breaches.

recovery.title: Recovery code
recovery.help: Generate a one-time recovery code that can reset your master password if you forget it. Store it somewhere safe and offline — anyone with it can reset your vault.
recovery.code_warning: Shown only once — write it down now. It cannot be retrieved later.
recovery.use_code: Forgot your master password? Use a recovery code
recovery.unlock_subtitle: Enter your recovery code and choose a new master password.

restore.subtitle: Roll the vault back to an earlier encrypted snapshot. Unlock with your current master password afterwards.
restore.done: Vault restored. Unlock it below with your master password.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.throttled: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.vault_exists: A vault already exists on this device.
errors.vault_not_found: No vault found on this device.
errors.version_conflict: This entry was changed elsewhere. Reopen it and try again.
errors.biometric_unavailable: Biometrics are not available on this device.
errors.biometric_failed: Biometric verification failed or was cancelled.
errors.recovery_not_enabled: No recovery code is set for this vault.
errors.network: Network error — could not reach the breach database.
errors.export: Could not read this backup file (wrong format or damaged).
errors.invalid_export_password: Incorrect backup password (or the file is damaged).
